samples.text: A glass can be half full and half empty at the same time. Is this logically consistent?
A glass is simultaneously half full and half empty. Does this make logical sense?
A cup can be half full and half empty at once. Is this logically consistent?
Half full and half empty describe the same state. So this is consistent, not contradictory. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A glass can be half full and half empty at the same time. The report is due on Friday. Is this logically consistent?
